description.value:
Prerequisite: Dex 15. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Tiger tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Tiger, you gain Pounce ability 1/day.
description.summary: Summon Tiger tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Tigers; Pounce ability 1/day within 50 ft of summon.
